mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(warn_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS warn_count, MAX(warn_level) AS max_warn_level FROM t_warn_record WHERE warn_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(warn_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY stat_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FORMATDATETIME(warn_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS warn_count, MAX(warn_level) AS max_warn_level FROM t_warn_record WHERE warn_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY FORMATDATETIME(warn_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') ORDER BY stat_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
